career_vision.target_path: Systems Consulting & IT Architecture with AI Specialization
career_vision.career_stage: Student building toward consulting and systems architecture roles
career_vision.timeline: Post-graduation (May 2027) into consulting or systems advisory role
career_vision.focus: Help organizations understand, architect, and improve their existing systems — with AI and automation as the primary lever for efficiency gains

professional_focus_areas: AI implementation into existing business workflows
IT consulting focused on measurable operational outcomes
Automation of repetitive processes using AI tooling
Translating technical architecture into business value
Digital transformation advisory for mid-size organizations
long_term_goals: Advise organizations on how to integrate AI into their existing systems without unnecessary disruption
Design scalable IT architectures that are built for automation from the ground up
Become a trusted systems consultant who bridges deep technical knowledge with strategic business thinking
Help companies identify where AI creates real efficiency — and where it doesn't
Lead technology modernization engagements that produce measurable ROI
ideal_work_environment: Consulting firms or internal strategy teams working on systems modernization
Organizations actively integrating AI into their operations
Roles that combine hands-on architecture work with client advisory
Teams that value analytical rigor and measurable outcomes over hype
Environments that reward continuous learning and experimentation
immediate_next_steps: Deepen AI implementation skills — RAG systems, LLM integration, agentic workflows
Build portfolio demonstrating systems design and AI-in-production experience
Complete IT internship focused on workflow automation and systems optimization
Develop consulting communication skills: translating architecture into business language
Explore enterprise AI deployment patterns and real-world constraints
